### Post by darweth on 2007-02-10

Here is my xorg: What do I need to edit to bring X back? :)

### Post by darweth on 2007-02-10
Well.  I got it up now.  It turned out to be another stupid thing I forgot to do.  I forget to disable module nv in a kernel file.  Now I have another problem though. New thread!
